nasb.text: You shall make four gold rings for it and put rings on the four corners which are on its four feet.

esv.text: And you shall make for it four rings of gold, and fasten the rings to the four corners at its four legs.

cnv.text: 你要做四個金環，把金環安放在桌子的四角上，就是在桌子的四腳上。

ccb.text: 要造四个金环，安在桌子四角的桌腿上，
